holdings.infoBox: NBIE is an equity ETF with a total of 261 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 4.03%, BHP Group at 2.13%, Novartis AG at 2.11%, Roche Holding AG at 1.84%, and ABB Ltd at 1.75%.

overview.description: The Neuberger International Core Equity ETF (NBIE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth through investments in large- and mid-cap companies from developed international markets, excluding the US. The funds security selection combines ESG, fundamental analysis, and quantitative research. NBIE was launched on Mar 6, 2026 and is issued by Neuberger Berman.
